_comment: Template for a new (multi-user) profile. Copy to users/<name>.json (NO leading underscore) to activate. Files starting with _ are ignored by the loader. Each user gets their own sheet tab and their own email. Cost is reported per user.
name: Friend Name
_active_note: Keep false until the friend has paid. false = profile exists but the agent does not run it.
_limits_note: Optional. max_scored caps how many jobs get Claude-scored (cost control); max_results caps matches saved/emailed. Use small values (e.g. max_results 3-4) for a cheap demo run. Omit 'limits' entirely for an uncapped run.
_use_paid_sources_note: false = skip the paid LinkedIn (Apify) source, run on free sources only (~free demo). Set true for full Gulf/EU coverage once the friend is paying.
relocation: Open to relocation with visa sponsorship to Europe and the Gulf
_cv_note: REQUIRED for multi-user CV tailoring. Same shape as cv_tailor.BASE_CV. If omitted, the agent falls back to the user's CV (wrong for a friend) — always provide this.

cv.name: Friend Name
cv.contact: Phone: +.. | Email: friend@example.com | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/friend | City: City

education.degree: Bachelor of Science | Computer Science | CGPA: 3.6/4.00

skills: Product: Roadmapping, Agile, OKRs, PRD Writing

_cv_variants_note: Optional. Per-track summary/skills overrides for strategy/consulting roles (same shape as cv_tailor.CV_VARIANTS). If omitted, those roles fall back to the master CV under the normal scoring gate.
